MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jessica Alexandra, 415.350.9795 for Plaintiff Matthew Naify.
Micheal Pecherer, 925.386.0943 Referee.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Referee in Partition's Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens and for an Injunction Prohibiting Matthew Naify from Recording any Further Lis Pendens is DENIED. Mr. Naify demonstrated by a preponderance of the evidence that he can succeed on his real property claims. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
